personas.context: Solo developer working on a 2D platformer in Godot. Sprite assets, scripts, and level data are scattered across folders.
Cleaning up a notebook + CSV directory after a paper-submission sprint. Multiple model checkpoints and intermediate datasets need pruning.
Organizing experiment artifacts: training logs, eval JSON files, and config YAMLs across run directories.
Maintaining a documentation repo of markdown files. Articles need renaming, frontmatter normalization, and image-path fixes.
Refactoring a Python service: moving modules into packages, adding __init__.py files, updating imports.
Cleaning up a monorepo's CI configuration: consolidating Dockerfiles, reorganizing GitHub Actions workflows, normalizing names.
Preparing a LaTeX paper directory for submission: figures, bib files, and chapter sources need organization and stripping of build artifacts.
Setting up a board-bringup repo: device-tree fragments, Kconfig snippets, and bring-up logs need filing into per-board subdirectories.
